properly.

• Monitor speaker volume adjustable on the mixer.

contentSample:
Tech Rider
VINYL POWER

Please note that we are a vinyl only crew.
The DJ booth should be in perfect conditions for playing
vinyl!
Please read the requirements very well and make sure
they are met.
In case of not meeting the requirements the artists can re -
fuse performing.
A sound check is required more than 60 minutes before
the doors are open.
This is extremely important, and most of the possible feed -
back problems are
solved during it.
A qualified technician needs to be attending the soun
